titleStmt.title: SII 15.176: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 176. (B.K. No. 58 of 1926-27.) HARTI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar in the Īśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1158, Durmukhi, Vaiśākha-paurṇami, Monday, corresponding to 1236 A.D., April 21, Monday f.d.t. °90.

It records a gift of specified income to the god Mūlasthānadēva, after laving the feet of āchārya Sōmēśvara-paṇḍita by the Twelve Gāvuṇḍas of Harati, Ugura Three Hundred and Dōṇi Thousand, headed by Chāvuṇḍayya. The Twelve Gāvuṇḍas of Harati and Aṟuvattokkalu also made another gift to the deity on the occasion.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:

gatapaṁcamahāśabdaṁ mahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ dvāra
vatīpuravarādhīsvaraṁ vriṣṇavaṁśōdbhavaṁ suva¨rṇnaga
ruḍadhvajaṁ yādavakuḷakamaḷakaḷikāvikāśabhāskaraṁ rā
yanārāyaṇaṁ prauḍhapratāpa bhujabaḷacakrava¨rtti śrī vīrasiṁgha
ṇadēvavijayarājyōdayavara caṁdrā¨rkkatārāṁbaraṁ salutta
mire . śakavaruṣaṁ 1158 neya du[¨r]mukhi sauvatsarada vaiśākha suddha
pau¨rṇnami sōmavāra byatīpāta saṁkrāṁti syaṁyōgavā
da(ṁ) puṇyadinadoḷu haratiya haṁni¨rbba gāvuṁḍuga
ḷuṁ Āṟuvatokkaluṁ vuguramūnū¨rvvaruṁ dōṇisā
si¨rvvaruṁ mukhyavāgi mottakāṟa cāvuṁḍayyanuṁ śrīmu
lasthānadēvarācā¨ryya sōmēsvarapaṁḍitara padaprakṣāḷanaṁ
māḍi dēvara pavitrārōpaṇake yēṇige haga voṁdumaṁ
sa¨rvvanamaśyavāgi biṭṭaru . svasti śrīmatu haratiya haṁni
¨rvva gāvuṁḍugaḷuṁ [Ā]ṟuvatokaluṁ mukhyavāgi
siriyamagavuḍanu yā puṇyatithiyoḷu sōmēsvara
paṁḍitara padaprakṣaḷanaṁ māḍi dēvara pavitrārōpaṇake vo
kalali hoṟevoṁdu vokuḷa jōḷa tōṭake haga yeraḍu nuṟaḍa
ke nuṟa Eleya hēṟiṁge vīsavoṁdu kaṭṭu sāsi¨rvvaru Āḷiṁ
ge hagavoṁdu sa¨rvvanamaśyavāgi biṭṭaru .
Digital edition of SII 15.176 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
